independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No tests use `pytest.fixture` with mutable state — use factory functions from `conftest.py`
criteria_verification.evidence: Added 'unit' marker to pyproject.toml and applied pytestmark=pytest.mark.unit to all five test files. Running `pytest tests/ -m unit -v` results in 196 passed, 395 deselected in 0.29s.
criteria_verification.notes: Added 'unit' marker to pyproject.toml and applied pytestmark=pytest.mark.unit to all five test files. Running `pytest tests/ -m unit -v` results in 196 passed, 395 deselected in 0.29s.

criteria_verification.evidence: Grep for 'pytest.fixture' in tests/ returns no fixtures with mutable state in the five relevant test files. All test data is created via factory functions (_make(), _make_heartbeat(), _make_manifest(), etc.) and conftest.py factory helpers (make_nats_config, make_envelope, etc.).
criteria_verification.notes: Grep for 'pytest.fixture' in tests/ returns no fixtures with mutable state in the five relevant test files. All test data is created via factory functions (_make(), _make_heartbeat(), _make_manifest(), etc.) and conftest.py factory helpers (make_nats_config, make_envelope, etc.).

criteria_verification.evidence: Created tests/test_events.py with TestHeartbeatMetadataMutableDefaultIsolation class containing 6 tests: (1) metadata defaults to empty dict, (2) two instances have distinct metadata objects (is not), (3) mutating one does not affect other, (4) metadata field uses default_factory, (5) metadata accepts arbitrary values, (6) many instances all independent. Also tests active_workflow_states isolation.
criteria_verification.notes: Created tests/test_events.py with TestHeartbeatMetadataMutableDefaultIsolation class containing 6 tests: (1) metadata defaults to empty dict, (2) two instances have distinct metadata objects (is not), (3) mutating one does not affect other, (4) metadata field uses default_factory, (5) metadata accepts arbitrary values, (6) many instances all independent. Also tests active_workflow_states isolation.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `test_topics.py` covers wildcard rejection scenarios from BDD spec
criteria_verification.evidence: TestManifestRegistryAbstract class in test_manifest.py contains test_cannot_instantiate_directly() which asserts `with pytest.raises(TypeError): ManifestRegistry()`. Also verifies abstract methods and InMemoryManifestRegistry subclass relationship.
criteria_verification.notes: TestManifestRegistryAbstract class in test_manifest.py contains test_cannot_instantiate_directly() which asserts `with pytest.raises(TypeError): ManifestRegistry()`. Also verifies abstract methods and InMemoryManifestRegistry subclass relationship.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestNegative class in test_topics.py contains test_identifier_with_wildcard_star_rejected() and test_identifier_with_wildcard_gt_rejected() which verify that identifiers containing '*' or '>' raise ValueError with match='(?i)wildcard|invalid'. These map directly to BDD Scenario 'Identifiers containing NATS wildcards are rejected'.
criteria_verification.notes: TestNegative class in test_topics.py contains test_identifier_with_wildcard_star_rejected() and test_identifier_with_wildcard_gt_rejected() which verify that identifiers containing '*' or '>' raise ValueError with match='(?i)wildcard|invalid'. These map directly to BDD Scenario 'Identifiers containing NATS wildcards are rejected'.

criteria_verification.evidence: test_config.py uses monkeypatch.setenv in 5 tests: test_env_url_override, test_env_user_password, test_env_creds_file, test_env_precedence, test_instances_independent. test_agent_config.py also uses monkeypatch.setenv in 6 tests for AGENT_* env vars. All env var tests correctly use monkeypatch.setenv (not os.environ).
criteria_verification.notes: test_config.py uses monkeypatch.setenv in 5 tests: test_env_url_override, test_env_user_password, test_env_creds_file, test_env_precedence, test_instances_independent. test_agent_config.py also uses monkeypatch.setenv in 6 tests for AGENT_* env vars.
